name: academorix/scheduling
purpose: Attribute-first task scheduling — attach #[Schedule], #[Cron], #[WithoutOverlapping], #[OnOneServer], or #[Environments] to a Job or Command and it registers itself.
when_to_use: Any Job or Command class needs a recurring schedule — the attribute registers itself at boot.
when_not_to_use: For one-shot dispatched jobs, use Laravel's queue directly without a scheduling attribute.
